llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The final coverage plan lists four main components: health (LifeFirst provider with physical and mental health), property (home and adventure equipment protection), travel (international medical and emergency assistance with stress-related support), and additional services (gym membership reimbursement and wellness programs). By matching each component to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: 
- The physical health coverage corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, which has a rating of 9.
- The mental health coverage also corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health, which has a rating of 9.
- The property coverage matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, which has a rating of 9.
- The travel coverage aligns most closely with 'TravelFirst Standard Plan' since the description includes international medical and stress-related support, which matches its description in the ground-truth list, with a rating of 9.
- The additional services include gym membership reimbursement and wellness programs; these correspond to 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 4) and 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3) under health_enhancement_services.
